title: Dark Fantasy Shader
description: A dark, cinematic Minecraft shaderpack inspired by Dark Souls and Elden Ring
body:
# Dark Fantasy Shader
----------------------------------------------
A dark, cinematic Minecraft shaderpack drawing inspiration from Dark Souls, Elden Ring, and Blasphemous. Wraps the world in thick atmospheric fog that tightens and shifts hue during storms. Nights are cold and blue-tinted with just enough ambient light to stay navigable. Torches cast warm orange glow that slightly desaturates in rain. The sky fills with animated, wind-drifted storm clouds. When it rains, layered screen-space streaks and mist scatter sell the effect. Color grading runs through a filmic tonemap with crushed blacks, reduced saturation, and a subtle crimson highlight push. Soft vignette edges frame the scene without hard black borders.
